title: Currywurst Wrap
description: A classic German street food made with spicy sausage and topped with ketchup and curry powder, served in a crispy wrap.
instructions: 1. Grill the Spanish sausage over medium-high heat until browned and cooked through.
2. Slice the sausage into thin rounds.
3. Grill the wraps for 30-60 seconds on each side, until crispy and lightly charred.
4. Spread a tablespoon of horseradish sauce onto each wrap.
5. Top with a few slices of sausage, some shredded cheese, and a spoonful of ketchup.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Garnish with additional ketchup and cheese if desired.
